title: "[GOVERNANCE] "
labels: governance-proposal
---

## Proposal title

<!-- A clear, concise title for this governance change. -->

## Proposal type

<!-- Check the one that applies: -->

- [ ] Standard — routine decision, standard voting period
- [ ] Urgent — operational necessity, 48-hour voting period (leaders/admins only)
- [ ] Governance change — amends governance rules, 30-day voting period, supermajority required

## Current state

<!-- What exists now? What is the current rule, parameter, or process you want to change? -->

## Proposed change

<!-- What specifically should change? Be precise — governance proposals that are vague will not pass. -->

## Rationale

<!-- Why is this change needed? What problem does it solve or what improvement does it make? -->

## Impact assessment

<!-- Who and what is affected by this change? Consider: -->

- **Stakeholder groups affected**: 
- **Token economics impact**: 
- **Operational impact**: 
- **Risk of unintended consequences**: 

## Voting tier

<!-- Which approval threshold applies? Reference GOVERNANCE.md. -->

- [ ] Simple majority — if this action category has been moved to majority
- [ ] Supermajority (default) — standard for all actions unless explicitly moved

## Alignment with philosophy

<!-- How does this change serve the principles in PHILOSOPHY.md and POSTULATES.md? A governance change that contradicts the philosophy cannot be ratified. -->

## Additional context

<!-- Any supporting data, references, or analysis. -->
